reviews.comment:
El hotel cumple perfectamente. Limpio, sábanas y toallas limpias, wifi funciona perfecto, cama cómoda. Desayuno en YPF incluido. Recomiendo como hotel de paso

(Translated by Google)
The hotel is perfect. Clean, clean sheets and towels, Wi-Fi works perfectly, comfortable bed. Breakfast at YPF is included. I recommend it as a stopover hotel.
